name: Smith River below Philpott
notes: Trophy tailwater; walk-ins from several roadside pullouts.

name: Jackson River (Hidden Valley)
notes: USFS land; wade access from Hidden Valley campground.

name: South River (Waynesboro)
notes: Urban tailwater; multiple riverwalk access points.

name: Big Tumbling Creek (Clinch Mtn. WMA)
notes: Fee fishing on Clinch Mtn. WMA; heavily stocked.

name: Rapidan River (Shenandoah NP boundary)
notes: Native brook trout; multiple FS-trail access points.
